decision.primary_power_zone: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

components.label: Tangible loan-book equity (adjusted book)
components.evidence: Q1 2026 earnings presentation: book $14.47/sh, adjusted book $14.90/sh at 2026-03-31. Portfolio WA LTV 66%, risk rating 2.8, no realized losses.
components.scenario_assumptions: Adjusted book as primary asset claim before market discount.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Marks, ACL, and leverage are inside book.
components.falsifier: Credit losses or mark-to-market force book below the low case.

components.label: External manager fee drag (Tremont/RMR)
components.evidence: 1.5% base fee on equity + 20% incentive over 7% hurdle; FY2025 management fees ~$5.0M.
components.scenario_assumptions: Structural drag versus internalized peers, capitalized as a reserve against book.
components.falsifier: Fee load or internalization cost proves larger than the low case.

components.label: CRE credit and capital-redeployment reserve
components.evidence: Rights-offering capital still deploying ($56.6M cash, $44M unfunded commitments, $397.5M unused financing). Sector CRE fear; SEVN has zero CBD office but remains levered (D/E 1.4).
components.scenario_assumptions: Haircut for credit cycle and deployment lag not fully in ACL (1.3% of commitments).
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Rights-offering capital not yet fully earning.
components.falsifier: Realized losses or failed redeployment push economic equity below the low case.

components.label: Distributable-earnings franchise (embedded in book multiple)
components.evidence: Q1 2026 DE $0.24/sh (temp dilution); Q4 2025 was $0.28/sh. Embedded in how the market capitalizes book — treated as embedded so not double-counted with book equity.
components.scenario_assumptions: Earnings power is the cross-check for the book multiple, not a second stack.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Marks, ACL, and leverage are inside book.
components.falsifier: Dividend cut and DE permanently below coverage invalidate income-capitalization cross-checks.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Tangible loan-book equity (adjusted book)
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Adjusted book as primary asset claim before market discount.

top_value_drivers.label: External manager fee drag (Tremont/RMR)
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Structural drag versus internalized peers, capitalized as a reserve against book.

top_value_drivers.label: CRE credit and capital-redeployment reserve
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Haircut for credit cycle and deployment lag not fully in ACL (1.3% of commitments).

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
applicability_tests: Industry capacity, additions, closures, and replacement costs can be measured.
Current margins can be located relative to a cycle rather than extrapolated.
Maintenance and growth capital are separated.
Leverage and liquidity survive the low case.
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.
